indications.text:
ODEFSEY is indicated as a complete regimen for the treatment of HIV-1 infection in adult
and pediatric patients weighing at least 25 kg:
 as initial therapy in those with no antiretroviral treatment history with HIV-1 RNA
less than or equal to 100,000 copies/mL or
 to replace a stable antiretrovir...
